# Tigecycline 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tigecycline 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tigecycline</strong> 目前有 <strong>19 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tigecycline 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Tygecycline Accord is indicated in adults and in children from the age of eight years for the treatment of the following infections (see sections 4.4 and 5.1):  Complicated skin and soft tissue...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>disorder of tyrosine metabolism（95.8%）</li>
<li>teratogenic Pierre Robin syndrome（95.3%）</li>
<li>tetrahydrobiopterin-responsive hyperphenylalaninemia/phenylketonuria（94.9%）</li>
<li>disorder of phenylalanine metabolism（93.6%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（93.5%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（93.5%）</li>
<li>congenital analbuminemia（92.8%）</li>
<li>blood group incompatibility（91.9%）</li>
<li>premalignant hematological system disease（91.8%）</li>
<li>monoclonal gammopathy（90.9%）</li>
<li>hematological disease associated with an acquired peripheral neuropathy（90.2%）</li>
<li>pyelonephritis（90.0%）</li>
<li>congenital hematological disorder（89.0%）</li>
<li>septicemic plague（88.1%）</li>
<li>streptococcal pneumonia（88.0%）</li>
<li>neonatal epileptic encephalopathy due to glutaminase deficiency（84.9%）</li>
<li>semicircular canal dehiscence syndrome（84.8%）</li>
<li>idiopathic bilateral vestibulopathy（84.8%）</li>
<li>genetic otorhinolaryngological malformation（84.7%）</li>
<li>inborn disorder of phenylalanin or tyrosine metabolism（84.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/tigecycline/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
